nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 鹟科

nodes.name: 辛巴威

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mocking cliff chat
nodes.summary: Mocking cliff chat（Mocking cliff chat，学名 Thamnolaea cinnamomeiventris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The mocking cliff chat, mocking chat or cliff chat, (Thamnolaea cinnamomeiventris) is a species of chat in the family Muscicapidae which occurs in rocky habitats in much of eastern Sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The mocking cliff chat, mocking chat or cliff chat, (Thamnolaea cinnamomeiventris) is a species of chat in the family Muscicapidae which occurs in rocky habitats in much of eastern Sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The mocking cliff chat occurs in a neat band from central Ethiopia in the north through east Africa into Zimbabwe, south-eastern Botswana, southern Mozambique and eastern South Africa as far as the far east of Western Cape province
